doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The core 735 ILCS 5/9-209 statutory language is genuine and accurately reproduced, but the supplementary provisions on email service authorization and summons timing appear to be editorial additions not drawn directly from the statute itsel
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 62
REASON: The core statutory text of 735 ILCS 5/9-209 regarding the 5-day rent demand is real and accurately quoted, but the additional provisions on email service and the "7-day summons" rule appear to be editorial elaborations or paraphrases not directly from the statute, making this a mix of genuine and potentially invented elements.

REASON: The core 735 ILCS 5/9-209 statutory language is genuine and accurately reproduced, but the supplementary provisions on email service authorization and summons timing appear to be editorial additions not drawn directly from the statute itself.
